name: Day of the Dead: Solitaire Collection
short_description: Step into the Realm of the Dead! Master 300+ Solitaire levels, collect mystical cards, and decorate your very own cemetery in this hauntingly beautiful Day of the Dead adventure. Dare to enter?
detailed_description:
Greetings, living one…

Are you ready to cross the veil and take on a haunting Solitaire adventure with a mystical twist? Look no further. Your mystical Solitaire adventure awaits in Day of the Dead - Solitaire Collection.

Looking for a spooky and beautiful game for the Halloween season? Step into the vibrant world of Día de los Muertos and honor the spirits in style. Collect unique cards, master hundreds of layouts, and decorate your very own cemetery to welcome the wandering souls from the Land of the Dead.

Features

  • 💀 Decorate the Realm of Spirits – Unlock and place 20 festive Day of the Dead decorations to create a cemetery unlike any other.

  • 🃏 Build Your Own Deck – Discover and collect 35+ beautifully designed cards to customize your Solitaire experience.

  • 🔮 Hundreds of Challenges – Conquer 100 levels with 3 rounds each for a total of 300 exclusive layouts.

  • ⚔️ Tricky Obstacles Await – Outsmart clever mechanics and complete devious tasks as you advance.

  • ⚡ Boost Your Power – Use 10 unique boosters to overcome the toughest levels.

Whether you’re a Solitaire master or just looking for a magical escape, Day of the Dead – Solitaire Collection offers the perfect mix of mystery, strategy, and festive charm for all Halloween lovers.

✨ Dare to play… and welcome the souls from beyond! ✨

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Dutch, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
